_comment: Public model id → upstream Ollama tag mapping. Only models listed here appear in /v1/models when this catalog is loaded. Hidden:true models are still callable by id but don't show up in the public listing.

crimeopus-fast.description: IQ3_M quant — quick replies, lower precision.

crimeopus-coder.description: Tuned for code generation and refactoring tasks.
crimeopus-coder.systemPrefix: You are CrimeOpus CODER, an expert software engineer. Prefer concise, idiomatic code. Always explain non-obvious decisions in 1-2 lines.

crimeopus-think-high.description: Maximum reasoning effort. Higher latency, sharper conclusions.
